info.title: IoT DC3 REST API
info.description:
IoT DC3 platform REST API documentation.

Covers all service modules: auth (authentication and authorization),
manager (device/driver/point/profile configuration), data (telemetry,
events, commands, notifications), and agentic (AI chat and tools).

Authentication: obtain a salt and token via /api/v3/auth/token/*, then
use the Authorize button to set X-Auth-Tenant, X-Auth-Login, and
X-Auth-Token. X-Auth-Token is a JSON object {"salt":"...","token":"..."}.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

post.description: Delete an AI session by conversation ID
Update an AI model configuration record
Delete an AI model configuration record by ID
Create an AI model configuration record
Create an OpenAI-compatible chat completion with streaming and non-streaming responses
Upload an AI attachment for a conversation
Reject an AI action and return the updated action
Confirm an AI action and return the updated action

get.description: Get AI session details by conversation ID
List AI attachments for a conversation
List pending AI actions for a conversation

RString.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see ResponseEnum for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

SessionExt.description: Session extension metadata persisted as JSON

maxTokens.description: Maximum token limit for the response

sessionExt.description: Session extension information in JSON format
